author: akashchi
title: test_keras_lstm_flags_float32 fails with LSTM accuracy mismatch on CPU
failed_job: TensorFlow Layer Tests / TensorFlow Layer Tests
error_summary: AssertionError: Comparing with Framework failed - Max diff is 0.11681008338928223
root_cause: Flaky numerical accuracy issue in LSTM (Keras/TF2 FE) on Windows CPU. The tolerance threshold is exceeded by a small numerical difference in LSTM computation with dropout enabled (0.1, 0.3), relu activation, recurrent_activation=tanh, float32. Unrelated to PR #36640.
